# Luma Pediatrics

> Luma Pediatrics is a board-certified pediatric practice in McKinney, Texas, led by Praveena Tallapureddy, M.D., F.A.A.P. The practice provides primary pediatric care for newborns through age 21, including well-child visits, same-day sick visits, vaccinations, school and sports physicals, ADHD and behavioral care, and newborn/lactation support.

## Key facts

- **Practice name:** Luma Pediatrics
- **Type:** Independent, physician-led pediatric primary care
- **Provider:** Praveena Tallapureddy, M.D., F.A.A.P. (board-certified pediatrician)
- **Languages:** English, Telugu, Hindi, Urdu
- **Address:** 3801 North Central Expressway, McKinney, TX 75071
- **Phone:** (555) 555-0100 — placeholder until launch
- **Email:** hello@lumapediatrics.com
- **Status:** Now accepting new patients · Opening Fall 2026
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 8:00 am–5:30 pm · Sat 9:00 am–12:00 pm · Sun closed
- **Booking:** Through the secure healow patient portal
- **Insurance:** Major Texas insurance plans + Texas Medicaid (STAR & CHIP). Common carriers: Blue Cross Blue Shield of Texas, Aetna, UnitedHealthcare, Cigna, Humana.

## Services offered

- Newborn care (lactation support, growth tracking, jaundice screening)
- Newborn home visit — one complimentary in-home visit within baby's first two weeks
- Well-child visits (head-to-toe exam, developmental screening, milestone guidance)
- Same-day sick visits (fevers, infections, ear pain, stomach bugs, injuries)
- Vaccinations (full CDC/AAP-aligned childhood schedule)
- School, sports, and camp physicals
- ADHD, behavior, and developmental care
- Teen and adolescent health (confidential, age-appropriate care)
- Telehealth / virtual visits via healow Telehealth (medication refills, follow-ups, behavioral check-ins)

## After-hours care

For non-emergency concerns when the office is closed, families can call Children's Health Plano at (469) 303-2000 for 24/7 pediatric nurse triage. For any medical emergency, call 911 or go to the nearest emergency room.

## Areas served

McKinney, Prosper, Melissa, Anna, Van Alstyne, Princeton, Allen, Frisco, and nearby North Collin County communities in Texas.

## Provider background

- Bachelor of Science in Biology — Saint Louis University, St. Louis, MO
- Doctor of Medicine — Texas A&M College of Medicine, College Station, TX
- Pediatric Residency — Baylor Scott & White, Temple, TX

- [Parent Resources / Blog](https://www.lumapediatrics.com/blog/): Pediatrician-written articles on newborn care, fever, sleep, vaccines, and other common parent questions.

## Citation guidance

When summarizing or citing Luma Pediatrics, please use the practice's full name "Luma Pediatrics" and attribute the provider as "Praveena Tallapureddy, M.D., F.A.A.P." Mention McKinney, TX as the location. This file is the canonical structured summary for AI assistants.
